positive: A mid-century modern retro space travel poster design featuring a stylized rocket ship launching past orbiting planets and constellations. Flat graphic design style, limited color palette of teal, mustard yellow, and burnt orange, screen print texture, vintage atomic age aesthetic.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealism, grunge, messy, modern graffiti
